name: coupon
description: Discount code + redemption tracker. Answers 'what discount applies to this invoice line, and how many times has this coupon been used?'. Ships TWO tables: `coupons` (the discount config — percent / fixed_amount / free_period / first_month_free / bogo with usage caps, expiry, applicability filters), `coupon_redemptions` (per-use pivot with atomic constraint check — this coupon x this customer x this invoice/membership tuple). Complements referrals — a referral CAN issue a coupon code for the referred to redeem, but coupons ALSO exist standalone (seasonal SUMMER25, corporate CORP_DISCOUNT, promotional Newsletter subscriber code). Redemption is atomic — the check 'is this coupon still valid AND has this customer not already redeemed AND has program cap not exceeded' happens in a single DB transaction with row lock on the coupon record. Every redemption fires a marketing event for ad-network attribution + a domain event that finance::invoice can subscribe to for line-item discount application. Fraud checks (device fingerprint match, email-variant match, velocity limits) delegated to `growth::referrals::FraudDetector` when the coupon was issued via referral; standalone coupons rely on usage_cap + per_customer_limit + coupon.rate_limit middleware.
planned_consumers: membership (Wave 4 — MembershipRenewal reads applicable coupons for the parent's next-period charge before dispatching to Finance)
invoice (Wave 4 — every invoice line resolves eligible coupons via CouponValidator + freezes a CouponRedemption snapshot inside the invoice-creation transaction)
referrals (Wave 5 — a referral program's reward can be issued as a coupon code; the referrals module calls CouponIssuer::issueForReferral() to produce a redeemable code)

tenant.description: Tenant-facing coupon surface. Every admin route carries `sanctum` + `X-Application-Id` + `entitlement.enforce:coupon_capture`. Owner + marketing role author coupons + read redemption ledger; support role reads only. Customer-facing routes validate-only + preview-only (POST /redeem is deliberately absent — redemption is an internal service call inside the invoice-creation transaction to prevent replay attacks and preserve atomic invoice-level redemption).

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant support tooling. Ops + support review coupon issuance + redemption ledgers cross-tenant for regulator-facing reporting.
